description: [su] - Run a command with substitute user and group ID. Sourced directly from Linux Journey curriculum foundations.

commands.description: Switch session fully to 'username' and initialize their environment
commands.explanation: Executes the su routine logically to process: switch session fully to 'username' and initialize their environment

commands.description: Switch cleanly to the root administrator
commands.explanation: Executes the su routine logically to process: switch cleanly to the root administrator
